hero.description: {experience} years crafting mobile and web applications across fintech, enterprise, and education. Currently at {company}, building the Plus+ platform.

about.label: About Me
about.title: Passionate Developer with 3+ Years of Experience
about.description: Born on July 1, 1999. My friends call me Min Kaung. I specialize in mobile and frontend development, continuously expanding into full-stack and backend technologies.
about.bio: I started my career as a freelance mobile developer with MCY, building learning management systems and language apps. This foundation led me to Tech Breeze, where I became a director, building event ticketing and factory management systems. At ACE Data Systems, one of Myanmar's largest corporate companies, I architected secure mobile banking applications (FPB & SMEDB) that are live on both App Store and Play Store. Now at Yoma Fleet, I'm developing the Plus+ platform — a lease-to-buy employee benefit program powered by Golang microservices. In 2026, I'm expanding into Golang, Python for AI, server management, and CI/CD to level up my full-stack capabilities.

skills.mobile_desc: Expert in React Native (CLI & Expo) with apps published on App Store & Play Store. Specializing in fintech and enterprise mobile solutions.
skills.frontend_desc: Building modern web apps with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Strong focus on performance, accessibility, and elegant user interfaces.
skills.backend_desc: Experience with Laravel, Node.js, and currently learning Golang. Building microservices and RESTful APIs for production systems.
skills.fullstack_desc: Bridging frontend and backend with tools like Inertia.js, React Query, and state management solutions (Redux, Zustand).

experience.label: Career Journey
experience.title: Where I've Made Impact
experience.description: From freelancing to directing, from building learning apps to crafting secure banking systems deployed to millions.
